$comment: Code<->Figma contract for TYPOGRAPHY (PEA-219). The 8 composite --text-* tokens in the design-system @theme (dist/tokens.css) carry font-size + line-height [+ letter-spacing/font-weight for headings], 1:1 with the Figma 'typography' text styles (renamed to the variant names: heading-1..4, body-lg/body/body-sm/body-xs). check_typography_drift.mjs asserts each token's px/em/weight equals the resolved @theme value + figmaStyle name bijection. The <Text variant> component (packages/cw-design-system-ts/src/components/ui/text.tsx) exposes these as a closed typed set via cva. Body styles have /regular,/medium,/bold weight variants in Figma -> the <Text> weight prop (font-normal/medium/semibold); the size/LH token is shared, so this snapshot keys by the size stem. Heading letter-spacing is em (rounded 3dp; ~Figma's -1.5/-1/-1px at 48/30/24px). caption + monospaced were retired in Figma (rebound to body-sm / body) — the typography set is now exactly the 16 styles (4 headings + 12 body = these 8 size tokens × regular/medium/bold). Refresh via use_figma per CONVENTIONS.md §8.
